flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwest Mississippi Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.4k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwest Mississippi Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (28.8% → 25.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwest Mississippi Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.1k → $6.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwest Mississippi Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (57.6% → 69.2%).
